compiled_state.title: [create-dso-app.sh]: bash <(curl ...) with no project-name arg -> silent exit, no prompt
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

**Reproduction:** `bash <(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra/HEAD/plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh)`

**Observed:** Only output is `All dependencies satisfied.` then script exits 0. No project is created, no prompt shown.

**Expected:** User is prompted for a project name and a project is created.

**Root cause (preliminary):** plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh lines 228-231 — when no positional $1 is passed, the script treats this as 'dep-check-only mode' and silently exits. The `exec < /dev/tty` tty-reattach on line 288-290 never runs because the early exit is before it.

**User approval:** Option 1 — add interactive prompt for project name when no arg is given and stdin can be reattached to tty.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC — single file, obvious cause, local reproduction, deterministic)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test
